full_name: Wrought aluminium alloy EN AW-7075 [Al Zn5.5MgCu], numeric 3.4365
version_year: Composition per EN 573-3; properties per EN 485 / EN 755
scope: High-strength heat-treatable Al-Zn-Mg-Cu aerospace alloy. In the T6 temper it offers among the highest strength of common aluminium alloys with good fatigue performance, used for aircraft structures, highly stressed parts, moulds and tooling.
license_note: EN AW-7075 designation and its nominal composition and typical T6 property ranges are widely published in free manufacturer datasheets, Wikipedia and reference sites; no paywalled EN standard text reproduced.
